A. `project-architecture` Record: Project-architecture records capture decisions that are useful inside one
B. `engineering-principles` Record: Engineering-principle records capture transferable guidance. They are advisory
C. Staging State Machine: Staging is the review state before a candidate becomes authoritative. Rejected
